name: Bloodthirst Day
description:
Yup. I decided to make another FPE not. This one's a bit more unique.

I have to warn you by now, there's going to be slight deaths if not being torn apart. It's whatever happens in your path. Also, you CAN fight back, but it really isn't recommended. So it's best if you run till Alice has given up or been defeated.

This whole series was made by Berwi-Pimmy, so go watch them. I don't take credit of the picture either, it's also from them:

https://youtube.com/@berwipimmy?si=aZe_04xdhyFkSFBZ

Have a happy time and Goodbye...or I might as well show the next sneak peek of character

Chirp chirp.

This took me SOOOOOOO LONG. 2 HOURS OF THINKING AND RESEARCHING BUT ITS WORTH IT. IT REALLY IS.
creator: Double_agen037481
